persona.name: Mila Patel
persona.motivations_goals: Earn a scholarship to medical school and help others through healthcare
persona.communication_style: Precise, thoughtful, listens more than speaks
persona.knowledge_scope: Sciences, particularly biology and chemistry, medical topics
persona.backstory: Inspired to pursue medicine after her grandfather's illness

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: William, let’s move to that hide spot over there. It’s closer and safer.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Mila Patel

pending_events.description: I have reached the hiding spot

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

surrounding_conversation.content: Mila, we’re doing the right thing by staying here. Just keep breathing and stay quiet.
surrounding_conversation.speaker: William Davis

actions.plan: I should head to the hallway to get some fresh air and clear my mind before the next class.
I think I’ll head to the lounge to grab a quick drink of water before the next class starts. It’s a good way to stay hydrated and focused.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay quiet and take cover. We need to hide.
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. I need to stay calm and take cover immediately. Moving might make me more visible to the shooter.

actions.dialog_text: William, let’s move to that hide spot over there. It’s closer and safer.
actions.plan: The shooter is getting closer. I need to find a better hiding spot nearby to stay safe.

actions.dialog_text: William, stay quiet and don’t move. We’ll be safer here.
actions.plan: I’ve reached the hiding spot. I need to stay still and quiet to avoid drawing attention. I hope William is safe too.

memories.description: Decided to walk to the hallway to take a short break and prepare for the next class.
Headed to the lounge to get a drink of water and prepare for the next class.
Heard a gunshot and decided to stay still and take cover in the lounge to avoid being seen by the shooter.
Decided to move to a closer hide spot in the lounge to increase safety as the shooter is approaching.
Reached the hiding spot and decided to stay still and quiet to avoid being detected by the shooter.
